heading: Repealed or Omitted
label: 16761 Repealed or Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , ; , , , which related to Space Shuttle follow-on, was repealed in part and omitted in part. Subsecs. (a) and (b) were repealed and reenacted as , National and Commercial Space Programs, by , §§ 3, 6, , , 3444, which Act enacted Title 51. Subsec. (c), requiring Administrator’s report to congressional committees on lack of human space flight system to replace the Space Shuttle not later than 90 days after , was omitted from the Code following the enactment of Title 51.Pub.
